definition: sincere and serious in intention; not joking or pretending
sentence: She was completely __________, pouring her heart into every song she wrote about the boy who never noticed her.

definition: very enthusiastic or passionate
sentence: Her __________ devotion to him never faded, even after he drove away to college and left her behind.

definition: having a feeling of longing or regret tinged with sadness
sentence: She wore a __________ smile as she replayed their song in the truck, remembering exactly how the summer had felt.

definition: lacking experience or wisdom; innocently simple
sentence: Still __________ about the ways of the world, she searched for her place with wide, hopeful eyes.

definition: truthful and straightforward; not hiding one's thoughts
sentence: In her diary, she was brutally __________ about feeling invisible at school, writing things she could never say aloud.

definition: showing a lack of courage or confidence; easily frightened
sentence: She appeared __________ in the hallways, too shy to tell anyone what was really breaking her apart inside.

definition: prompted by feelings of tenderness or nostalgia
sentence: She grew __________ watching the old photographs, each one a doorway back to a childhood she couldn't return to.

definition: having or displaying a passionate intensity
sentence: She held a __________ hope that one day he would finally see her for exactly who she was.

definition: deep love and respect
song_title: I'm Only Me When I'm With You
sentence: The __________ in his eyes when he looked at her made every doubting voice in her head go quiet.

definition: an intense but short-lived passion or admiration for someone
sentence: What began as a simple __________ had grown into something she hadn't planned for and didn't know how to carry.

definition: expressing sorrow or melancholy; mournfully expressive
sentence: She sat in the cold car wearing a __________ expression — all that feeling directed at someone who barely noticed she was there.

definition: reserved, modest, and shy; reluctant to call attention to oneself
sentence: She chose to be __________ around him, keeping every feeling close, too careful to let him see how deeply she was paying attention.

definition: devoid of guile; innocent and without deception
sentence: She was entirely __________ in how she loved him — too open and trusting to protect herself from the ending she didn't see coming.

definition: to yearn to possess something belonging to another; to intensely desire
sentence: Even in her fury, she couldn't stop herself from __________ the easy, uncomplicated love she watched other people carry without thinking.

definition: reluctant to draw attention to oneself; self-conscious and shy
sentence: She was too __________ to speak to him directly, hoping he'd somehow read what was written in her eyes.

definition: free from pretense or deceit; proceeding from genuine feelings
sentence: Every word she wrote was completely __________, free of pretense, which was exactly what made her songs feel like confessions.

definition: having or displaying a friendly and pleasant manner
sentence: He was __________ in the way only someone unaware of their own effect on people can be — easy to talk to, impossible not to notice.

definition: deep respect for someone or something
sentence: She held their shared memories in almost religious __________, as if forgetting even one detail would be a kind of betrayal.

definition: playfully quaint or fanciful, especially in an appealing way
sentence: She had a __________ view of romance — full of fairy-tale imagery and silver linings she'd invented entirely herself.

definition: to admire, revere, or love greatly or excessively
sentence: She had begun to __________ him the way only a first love can make you — seeing perfection where there was only a boy.
